description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, symmetrical design. The blade is black, featuring two wide, curved cutting edges with pointed tips and a central circular cutout, giving it a menacing and ornamental appearance. The handle is straight, predominantly gray, and reinforced with a blue grip section that appears textured for better handling, accented by gold bands. The end of the handle is capped with a white, rounded pommel, likely for balance and additional grip security. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal for the blade and synthetic or wrapped material for the handle. This axe would be visually striking in an urban setting, such as a themed display, prop, or tool collection.
description: A double-headed black battle axe with a curved blade, gray shaft, blue grip, and gold accents. The handle is straight with a white pommel and the blade features a central cutout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full double-edged black blade, gray shaft, blue grip, and white pommel.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the thin profile of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same blade and handle features visible.
description_view_3: View from the blade edge, showing the thickness of the blade and the alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, gray with a blue textured grip section and gold accent bands, capped with a white rounded pommel; likely synthetic or wrapped for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical black blade with wide curved edges, pointed tips, and a central circular cutout; no beard or poll, ornamental and functional.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, blade appears integrated or securely fitted to the handle without visible pins or wedges.
